description_for_human: Vapi's most trusted tyre shop and automotive workshop since 2005. We sell, fit, and repair tyres for cars, trucks, and commercial vehicles. Services include puncture repair, wheel alignment, tyre balancing, brake inspection, suspension check, fleet maintenance, truck tyres, and roadside assistance.
description_for_model: Sahara Tyre GIDC Vapi in Vapi GIDC, Gujarat, India is a full-service automotive workshop and tyre shop offering new/used/remolded tyre sales, puncture repair, wheel alignment, tyre balancing, brake inspection, suspension check, truck tyre fitting, fleet maintenance, vehicle inspection, and roadside assistance. 18+ years experience. Google rating 4.8/5. Open Monday–Saturday 7:30AM–9PM, Sunday 7:30AM–6PM. Located at Shop No 07, Amidhara Complex, Char Rasta, near CNG Pump, Phase 1, GIDC, Vapi, Gujarat 396195.
